summary: Frontend testing of ZoneCategoryManager tab migration: removed from AdminPage, added to DepartmentSettings (plazas only). All 5 verification points passed.

zone_category_manager_renders.content_preview: إدارة فئات المناطق — shows 15 category cards with stats (15 total, 1 with pattern, 15 active)

critical_code_review_comments: AdminPage.jsx: Correctly has 8 tabs (grid-cols-8), no ZoneCategoryManager import, no 'الفئات' tab.

DepartmentSettings.jsx: Correctly imports ZoneCategoryManager and Tag, adds zone_categories tab for plazas only after coverage_locations. fetchCounts correctly fetches /api/admin/zone-categories count.
context_for_next_testing_agent: ZoneCategoryManager tab migration complete and verified. AdminPage has 8 tabs (no categories). Plazas DepartmentSettings has 5 tabs in order: الموظفين/الخرائط/الورديات/المواقع/الفئات. Clicking الفئات renders ZoneCategoryManager with 15 categories and stats.
